gitCommit.subject: fix(magazine): DB audit — all 7 fixes applied (pdf_url, branding guard, schema sync, types regen) (#1705)
gitCommit.body:
fix(magazine): DB audit — all 7 fixes applied (pdf_url, branding guard, schema sync, types regen) (#1705)

* docs(audit): add Magazine module DB infrastructure audit report

Exhaustive comparison of inventory document vs live Supabase Gold DB
vs application code. Key findings:
- 3 CRITICAL issues (pdf_url column missing, branding type mismatch,
  self-hosted MCP disconnected from Gold project)
- Inventory undercounts: 13 table objects (vs 4 documented), 14 RLS
  policies (vs 7), 9 PG functions (vs 2), 3 cron jobs (vs 0)
- 2 draft migrations already applied, 1 stale, 1 incompatible
- 5 edge functions all ACTIVE and verified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* fix(magazine): remove pdf_url ghost column — column does not exist in DB

The MagazineRow interface declared pdf_url and it was read/written in
rowToMagazine(), update(), restore(), and publicPayloadToMagazine().
However, the live DB (doufsxqlfjyuvxuezpln) has no pdf_url column on
the magazines table, so writes silently failed via PostgREST.

Removed from: MagazineRow, Magazine type, magazineService.ts (4 sites),
and 26 test fixture files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* fix(magazine): fix branding color validation to use colors.primary instead of primaryColor

validateBranding() in magazine-guard.ts was validating branding.primaryColor
which doesn't exist on MagazineClientBranding — colors are nested under
branding.colors.{primary,secondary,text}. The guard was dead code.

Now validates all three color fields (primary, secondary, text) against
the hex pattern. Also fixed test fixtures that used the wrong field name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* fix(magazine): sync MagazineRow with live DB — add view_count and archived_at

MagazineRow was missing view_count (number) and archived_at (timestamp)
columns that exist in the live DB. Added both to MagazineRow, mapped them
in rowToMagazine() and publicPayloadToMagazine(), and added viewCount/
archivedAt to the Magazine interface. Updated test fixtures accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* chore(magazine): archive 4 stale draft migrations

Moved to qa/migrations-draft/_archived/ with README explaining why:
- 2026-07-12_magazines.sql: STALE (schema diverged from live DB)
- 2026-07-12_magazine_reader_state.sql: INCOMPATIBLE (column name mismatch)
- 2026-07-12_magazine_items_unique_product.sql: ALREADY APPLIED
- 2026-07-15_magazine_public_token_trigger.sql: ALREADY APPLIED

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* docs(magazine): add guard comments for magazine_token_hash column name

The draft migration used magazine_token (raw token) but the live DB
uses magazine_token_hash (SHA-256). Added inline comments in both
reader-state edge functions to prevent accidental column name changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* fix(magazine): add viewCount/archivedAt to remaining test fixtures

Adds the new Magazine fields (viewCount: 0, archivedAt: null) to all
remaining test fixtures in tests/magazine/, e2e/magazine/, and
MagazineEditorPage.hooksOrder.test.tsx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* feat(magazine): regenerate Supabase types — magazine tables now typed

Regenerated src/integrations/supabase/types.ts from the Gold project
(doufsxqlfjyuvxuezpln). Magazine tables (magazines, magazine_items,
magazine_reader_state, magazine_public_reactions, magazine_public_view_events)
are now included in the generated types.

REGRA #4 verification:
- export type count: 7 (unchanged)
- Critical tables verified present: personalization_techniques, products,
  product_variants, suppliers, supplier_products_raw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* docs(magazine): update audit report with all 7 fixes applied

Added "Fixes Applied" section to the audit report showing all 7
issues from the Magazine DB audit have been resolved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

The MagazineRow interface declared pdf_url and it was read/written in
rowToMagazine(), update(), restore(), and publicPayloadToMagazine().
However, the live DB (doufsxqlfjyuvxuezpln) has no pdf_url column on
the magazines table, so writes silently failed via PostgREST.

Removed from: MagazineRow, Magazine type, magazineService.ts (4 sites),
and 26 test fixture files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* fix(magazine): fix branding color validation to use colors.primary instead of primaryColor

validateBranding() in magazine-guard.ts was validating branding.primaryColor
which doesn't exist on MagazineClientBranding — colors are nested under
branding.colors.{primary,secondary,text}. The guard was dead code.

Now validates all three color fields (primary, secondary, text) against
the hex pattern. Also fixed test fixtures that used the wrong field name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_016ho2ioGuJmyWEgHroi3qv8

* fix(magazine): sync MagazineRow with live DB — add view_count and archived_at

MagazineRow was missing view_count (number) and archived_at (timestamp)
columns that exist in the live DB. Added both to MagazineRow, mapped them
in rowToMagazine() and publicPayloadToMagazine(), and added viewCount/
archivedAt to the Magazine interface. Updated test fixtures accordingly.

Now validates all three color fields (primary, secondary, text) against
the hex pattern. Also fixed test fixtures that used the wrong field name.

* fix(magazine): sync MagazineRow with live DB — add view_count and archived_at

MagazineRow was missing view_count (number) and archived_at (timestamp)
columns that exist in the live DB. Added both to MagazineRow, mapped them
in rowToMagazine() and publicPayloadToMagazine(), and added viewCount/
archivedAt to the Magazine interface. Updated test fixtures accordingly.

* docs(magazine): add guard comments for magazine_token_hash column name

The draft migration used magazine_token (raw token) but the live DB
uses magazine_token_hash (SHA-256). Added inline comments in both
reader-state edge functions to prevent accidental column name changes.
